div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Demand letter .docx
every token rendered to its
verified value — token-free text

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Binder .pdf
unstamped index page, then
continuous Bates: CP00001, CP00002...
excluded pages honored

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Provenance report
1) every rendered fact + source anchor
(completeness property)
2) adverse facts omitted + rationale
3) judgment calls

span.p:
Draft manifest — manifest.py
exhibits + integrity verdicts,
EX tokens minted via the registry,
bare ids on the wire

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;

span.p:
BinderBlocked
pending PHI disposition or
failed integrity verdict
-> build refuses, gate shows why

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;

span.p:
ArtifactSet — IMMUTABLE
keyed (matter, draft_version,
registry_version)
rebuild returns the SAME set (reused)
